title: TimeVersa: Travel Between Versions
description: TimeVersa is a mod that lets players time travel between versions. It currently supports Alpha 1.1.2, Alpha RD, and Indev Hell.
body:
![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86ede33d213f3517f1f1ae53e9f5bfcb55d65e02.png)![World gen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6f7c35ab89b54a47b22b70eb35e24794654c4cc.png)

**What is time versa?**

TimeVersa is a cool mod that lets you time travel in Minecraft, giving you the chance to explore some of the game’s earliest versions! Right now, you can travel back to Alpha_rd, Alpha 1.1.2, and Indev, three of Minecraft’s most iconic versions, and see how the game evolved.

**Note:**
Since TimeVersa isn't perfect, you might run into a few bugs, unfinished features, or limited content.

*Youtube channel*:
https://www.youtube.com/@mapachinlegacy

**THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB TO WORK**
